productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Black Max Air Backpack
description: Style Note A backpack easily distributes the weight across your shoulders and back, making loads easy to carry while keeping you looking cool and confident. Fill this versatile nike backpack with your laptop and office essentials, sportswear when you're heading to the field or gym, or use it on a trek in the great outdoors, and enjoy the ample storing space for all your gear. Product Details A black backpack with fluorescent green highlights and a Nike swoosh in the front Two Max Air air padded shoulder straps, one short handle on top and padded back The backpack has a water resistant tarpaulin bottom One main zippered compartment with an open laptop sleeve to hold a 15" laptop and organiser pockets One easily accessible zippered compartment in the front Two mesh pockets on the two sides Material and Care 16% nylon and 84% polyester exterior, 89% nylon and 11% polyester lining Do not machine wash or dry clean Do not bleach or iron Wipe with a damp cloth when necessary and line dry Size Height: 45 cm Width: 29 cm Depth: 19 cm
